projects.title: Smart Hospital Patient Monitoring System
projects.description: Smart Hospital Patient Monitoring SystemSituation:Manual monitoring of patient vital signs was time-consuming and inefficient.Task:Design and develop a real-time IoT-based patient monitoring system with a live dashboard.Action:Simulated sensor data for heart rate, SpO₂, and temperature usingPython.Processed and analyzed data using rolling averages and thresholdchecks.Built an interactive monitoring dashboard using Streamlit.Result:Enabled real-time visualization of patient health data.Improved early detection of abnormal health conditions.Strengthened practical knowledge of Python, IoT, and data visualization.

projects.title: Handwritten Digit Classifier Project
projects.description: Handwritten Digit Classifier Project Situation: Manual identification of handwritten digits is time-consumingand prone to errors.Task: Design and develop an automated handwritten digit recognition system using machine learning.Action:Preprocessed and trained a machine learning model using theMNIST dataset.Built a GUI application in Python to upload and processhandwritten digit images.Implemented prediction logic to classify digits accurately in real time.Result:Enabled fast and accurate handwritten digit recognition.Reduced manual effort and increased prediction reliability.Strengthened practical knowledge of Python, machine learning,and GUI development.

projects.title: Machine Learning Approaches for Predicting Disease
projects.description: Machine Learning Approaches for Predicting Disease-Associated Genetic VariantsPROFESSIONAL SUMMARY Collaborated in team-based academic projects with defined responsibilitiesPresented research and project outcomes during internal evaluationsApplied classroom concepts toreal-world problem statementsACADEMICEXPERIENCEAspiring Computer Science Engineering student with experience in Java development, machine learning projects,and academic research. Good foundation in Object-Oriented Programming, data analysis, and problem-solving, with a growing interest in applying AI and computing techniques to real-world and interdisciplinary domains.Situation: Need to apply machine learning concepts through a practicalproject.Task: Build a working machine learning model to predict disease-associated genetic variants.Action:Created and preprocessed a synthetic genetic dataset using PythonTrained and tested a Random Forest classification modelDeveloped a simple web application using StreamlitResult:Successfully predicted benign and disease-associated variantsImproved understanding of machine learning workflow and modeldeployment

projects.title: Synchronization and Deadlock Management
projects.description: Synchronization and Deadlock Management in SmartManufacturing SystemsSituation: Need to understand and implement synchronization and deadlockconcepts through a practical simulation-based project.Task: Design and develop a GUI-based system to simulate machinesynchronization and deadlock handling.Action:Designed a graphical user interface Simulated machine execution and shared resource allocationImplemented deadlock detection and recovery logicResult:Successfully demonstrated machine synchronization and deadlockresolutionImproved understanding of operating system concepts and GUI-based system design
